# Celebrate Harmon Killebrew’s Achievements On and Off the Field

by



Greg Likins

•

Published on

October 17, 2025
• Last modified on October 16, 2025

![baseball player smiling](https://image.pbs.org/bento3-prod/idahoptv/Blogs/3e769b1c6b_KillebrewBlog.jpg)

[Programming](https://www.idahoptv.org/blogs/programming/)

Experience Harmon Killebrew’s life and legacy, from his humble beginnings in Payette, Idaho, to baseball superstardom and his remarkable will to help others long after his baseball career ended.

Idaho Public Television’s original series _Idaho Experience_ explores some of Killebrew’s incredible feats with the Minnesota Twins, a special appearance on _Late Night With David Letterman_, and how Harmon’s charitable work continues to this day.

Killebrew once said, “The most important reason that we're here on Earth is to love and help one another.”

“He just felt like there were more important things than baseball. And helping each other was top on his list,” said his widow, Nita Killebrew. “He was a very compassionate person and loved to help people.”

Eric Westrom, the film’s producer, writer and editor, said, “Killebrew is one of the greatest athletes of all time from Idaho, but it’s what he did off the field that made him truly special. We’ve seen his impact on everyone we’ve met and interviewed for this show.”

**Harmon Killebrew: Idaho’s Big-Hearted Slugger** airs Thursday, Nov. 6, at 8:30 PM and again Sunday, Nov. 9, at 7:30 PM on Idaho Public Television. It will be available for streaming beginning Nov. 6 on the PBS app or online at _video.idahoptv.org_.

**Join us for a free screening event in Payette!** Join Idaho Public Television for a special screening of _Harmon Killebrew: Idaho's Big-Hearted Slugger_ on Thursday, Nov. 6, at 7 PM at the Payette High School Auditorium (1500 6th Ave. S. in Payette). This event is free and open to the public—no tickets needed!

![](https://image.pbs.org/bento3-prod/idahoptv/General%20Logos/IdahoPTV%20Logo/f60fc8fdea_idahoPTV_whiteText.png)

1455 N Orchard St

Boise ID 83706-2239
